heading: Acquisition of scientific or technical books, maps, etc., for library
label: 36a Acquisition of scientific or technical books, maps, etc., for library
text: The Director of the United States Geological Survey, under the general supervision of the Secretary of the Interior, is authorized to acquire for the United States, by gift or devise, scientific or technical books, manuscripts, maps, and related materials, and to deposit the same in the library of the United States Geological Survey for reference and use as authorized by law.
notes: Change of Name“United States Geological Survey” substituted in text for “Geological Survey” pursuant to provision of title I of , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 102–154section 31 of this title
